title: crinum toxicarium var. asiaticum
intro: Crinum toxicarium var. asiaticum, also known as the Asiatic crinum lily or toxic lily, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Crinum toxicarium var. asiaticum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antidote for certain poisonings. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
